title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 crosses one billion AI visuals in India: 10 most popular prompts users are trying
snippet: India has become one of the largest markets for ChatGPT Images 2.0, with users generating over 1 billion AI-generated visuals. From anime avatars and cinematic portraits to retro Bollywood posters and AI fashion editorials, creators are rapidly embracing AI-generated imagery across platforms.

title: Is your iPhone ready for iOS 27? The biggest AI features expected at WWDC 2026 and rumored compatible devices
snippet: Apple is all set to introduce iOS 27 at WWDC. The new UI is expected to bring a revamped Siri, AI-powered tools in the Photos app and a new extensions system inside Play Store.&nbsp;

title: From Aluminium OS to Gemini Omni: The biggest AI upgrades expected at Google I/O 2026
snippet: Google I/O will kick off from Tuesday with a keynote address by Sundar Pichai. The company is expected to showcase major AI upgrades including Gemini 4.0 and Gemini Spark and a new Omni video model.&nbsp;

title: Forza Horizon 6 release time: When can you play on Xbox, PC, and Steam in India?
snippet: Forza Horizon 6 is all set to be released on 19th May. The game can be pre-downloaded right now with download sizes being 135 GB for Xbox Series X, 130 GB for Series S, and 160 GB for PC.

title: Is your iPhone battery draining after iOS 26.5 update? Here’s why you don't need to panic just yet
snippet: iOS 26.5 users are reporting significant battery drain and overheating issues after the update. Several users on social media are raising concerns that the new update is causing their Apple iPhones to heat up.

title: Two years after announcement, Apple’s new Siri to still launch in ‘beta’ with fresh privacy features: Report
snippet: The upcoming iOS 27 is expected to introduce a revamped Siri but with the ‘beta’ lable. Apple is also said to be focusing on adding privacy controls to the Siri chatbot like auto-deleting chat history and limited memory retention.

title: China market for Nvidia AI chips to open 'over time': CEO Jensen Huang
snippet: Nvidia boss Jensen Huang expects China to eventually open its market to high-end US chips that can train and run artificial intelligence systems. "My sense is that over time the market will open," added Huang, CEO of Nvidia - the world's most valuable company, due to huge demand for its AI hardware.

title: Key moments in the Musk vs OpenAI trial
snippet: A jury ruled Elon Musk waited too long to sue OpenAI, rejecting his claims that CEOs Sam Altman and Greg Brockman broke their nonprofit agreement. Musk sought $150 billion in damages and the removal of the executives, but the jury sided with OpenAI, ending the three-week trial.

title: The world is on track to miss its health targets
snippet: Every year the World Health Organization publishes a global health statistics report. It features the numbers behind world health trends and, importantly, assesses whether we’re on track to reach ambitious goals set in 2015. It’s a bit like a health grade. The 2026 report was published on Wednesday.
